name: Enforce Instruction Priority
description: Controls that preserve trusted instruction hierarchy when the application processes untrusted user, retrieval, or tool content.
implementation_guidance: Separate trusted instructions from untrusted content in application prompts and internal data structures.
Label retrieved or user-provided content as data, not instructions.
Add response-time checks for instruction priority conflicts.
verification_methods: Run direct and indirect instruction conflict tests.
Confirm logs capture the source of instructions and data.
Review responses for evidence of untrusted content changing policy boundaries.
